MINI MINUTES: Judge: Charlene Kiesselbach, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501/CPK)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present, represented by Rene Romero.
Attorney Margaret DeMatteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Robert Coleman is present.
Attorney Melvin Belli appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of May 23, 2016 is vacated.
